Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCTE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod,ModuloSistema.FROTA,&PossuiModulo) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CteFinEms1 = nullvalue(&CteFinEms1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CteFinEms2 = nullvalue(&CteFinEms2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CteFinEms3 = nullvalue(&CteFinEms3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 2)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 2)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 2)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 2)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 2)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &AcoesemgrupoData = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Title = 'Retransmitir em Grupo' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'RetransmitirGrupo' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesemgrupoData.Add(&AcoesemgrupoDataItem) &AcoesemgrupoDataItem = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Title = 'Imprimir em grupo' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'Imprimir' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesemgrupoData.Add(&AcoesemgrupoDataItem) &AcoesemgrupoDataItem = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Title = 'Exportar em Grupo' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'Exportaremgrupo' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesemgrupoData.Add(&AcoesemgrupoDataItem) &AcoesemgrupoDataItem = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Title = 'CT-e Emitidos no período' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Link = WPCtePorCfop.Link() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesemgrupoData.Add(&AcoesemgrupoDataItem) If (&Context.TipoPerfil = 3 ) &AcoesemgrupoDataItem = new() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Title = 'Importa Xml' &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.Link = wpImportaXmlCTe.Link() &AcoesemgrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesemgrupoData.Add(&AcoesemgrupoDataItem) Endif &CteSts = nullvalue(&CteSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' CT-e' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido, &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido) RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod, &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta) EndEvent Event Refresh if &CteDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &CteDtaEms_To = serverdate() &CteDtaEms = &CteDtaEms - 15 EndiF retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCTE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) Do 'loadSelecionados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTENOMMOT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTENOMMOT' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTENOMMOT' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterContains") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWCTeColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWCTeColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf CteDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible CteNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &auxCteRemRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &auxSerCteTomRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &CteIniCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &auxCteDesRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &CteTerCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible CteVlrRecSer.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible CtePlcTra.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible CtePlc.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &auxCteNomMot.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible CteDocTra.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible CteViaCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible CteStsFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible CteSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount CteStsFin.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CteSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &userUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &sdsdgrid.Clear() &sdsdgrid.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer?') If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(1, 'Retransmitir') Endif &sdsdgrid.AddItem(2, 'Consultar') If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(3, 'Cancelar') Endif If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(4, 'Inutilizar') Endif &sdsdgrid.AddItem(5, 'Clonar') If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada or CteSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(6, 'Baixar Xml') Endif If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(7, 'Emitir MDF-e') Endif If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(8, 'Carta Correção') Endif If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada and &Context.TipoPerfil = 3 ) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(9, 'Comp. Entrega') Endif &TempBoolean = CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada and retornaSoNumeros.Udp(CteTomCnpj) = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCpj) If (&TempBoolean) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(10, 'Evento Desacordo') Endif If (not FilAtmCod.Trim().IsEmpty()) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(11, 'Averbar na atm') Endif If (not CteAveArq.trim().IsEmpty()) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(12, 'Baixar Averbação') Endif If (&PossuiModulo = 'S') &sdsdgrid.AddItem(13, 'Financeiro') Endif If (CteViaCod = 0 and &PossuiModulo = 'S') &sdsdgrid.AddItem(14, 'Iniciar Viagem') Endif If (&AutNiv >= 3) &sdsdgrid.AddItem(15, 'Excluir') Endif &sdsdgrid.AddItem(16, 'Log Erros') &EnviarEmail = !'' If (CteSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando) &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirDanfe = !'' If (CteSts = Status_NFe.autorizada or CteSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada) &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &auxCteRemRaz = trim(str(CteRemCod))+' -'+SubStr(trim(CteRemRaz),1,25) &auxSerCteTomRaz = trim(str(CteTomCod))+' -'+SubStr(trim(CteTomRaz),1,25) &CteIniCidNom = trim(CteIniCidNom)+ ' - '+CteIniUfe &auxCteDesRaz = trim(str(CteDesCod))+' -'+SubStr(trim(CteDesRaz),1,25) &CteTerCidNom = Trim(CteTerCidNom)+' - '+CteTerUfe &auxCteNomMot = substr(trim(CteNomMot),1,9) Do Case Case CteAveSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando &GridBadge = format(!"", "Não Averbado") Case CteAveSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada &GridBadge = format(!"", "Averbado") Case CteAveSts = Status_Nfe.Cancelada &GridBadge = format(!"", "Cancelada Averbação") Otherwise &GridBadge = '' EndCase Do Case Case CteStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO CteStsFin.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case CteStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO CteStsFin.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CteStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO CteStsFin.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise CteStsFin.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Denegada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise CteSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &CteSel = False &AuxCteCod = CteCod Do 'IsSelecionado' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &CteSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif If not FilAtmUsu.Trim().IsEmpty() &GridBadge.Visible = True Else &GridBadge.Visible = False EndIf &auxCteRemRaz.Tooltiptext = trim(CteRemRaz) &auxCteDesRaz.Tooltiptext = trim(CteDesRaz) iF (CteModCod = '67') &auxCteRemRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden' &auxCteDesRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden' &auxSerCteTomRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' Else &auxCteRemRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' &auxCteDesRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' &auxSerCteTomRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden' EndIf EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWCTeColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsdgrid.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsdgrid = 1 Do 'Do ReinviarNota' Case &sdsdgrid = 2 Do 'Do ConsultarSefaz' Case &sdsdgrid = 3 Do 'Do CancelarNota' Case &sdsdgrid = 4 Do 'Do InutilizarNumero' Case &sdsdgrid = 5 Do 'Do Clonarcte' Case &sdsdgrid = 6 Do 'Do ExportXml' Case &sdsdgrid = 7 Do 'Do MDFE' Case &sdsdgrid = 8 Do 'Do Cartacorrecao' Case &sdsdgrid = 9 Do 'Do ComprovanteEntrega' Case &sdsdgrid = 10 Do 'Do Desacordo' Case &sdsdgrid = 11 Do 'Do AverbacaoAtm' Case &sdsdgrid = 12 Do 'Do ExportaXml' Case &sdsdgrid = 13 Do 'Do Financeiro' Case &sdsdgrid = 14 Do 'Do IniciarViagem' Case &sdsdgrid = 15 Do 'Do Excluir' Case &sdsdgrid = 16 Do 'Do ConsultarStatus' EndCase &sdsdgrid = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Excluir' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' &Erro = 0 If &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido = 'S' ValidaCteDigitando.call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&erro) EndIf If &erro = 1 Msg("Atenção! Existe CT-e não resolvido (DIGITANDO) com data anterior ao dia de Hoje, Favor Resolve-los (AUTORIZADO, CANCELADO, INUTILIZADO)") Else &WebSession.Remove('WPCTE_Data') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPCte.Call(&PreviousStep, &CurrentStep, &GoingBack) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndEvent Event 'DoRelatorios' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPCtePorCfop.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Acoesemgrupo.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Acoesemgrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'RetransmitirGrupo' Do 'Do RetransmitirGrupo' Case ddo_Acoesemgrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'Imprimir' Do 'Do Imprimir' Case ddo_Acoesemgrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'Exportaremgrupo' Do 'Do Exportaremgrupo' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?4c74aeea-4ff7-4796-908f-513d0bf2fd04' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteNum", '', !'Nro', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxCteRemRaz", '', !'Remetente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxSerCteTomRaz", '', !'Tomador', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CteIniCidNom", '', !'Origem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxCteDesRaz", '', !'Destinatário', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CteTerCidNom", '', !'Destino', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteVlrRecSer", '', !'R$.Serviço', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CtePlcTra", '', !'Tração', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CtePlc", '', !'Reboque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxCteNomMot", '', !'Motorista', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteDocTra", '', !'Nro DT', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteViaCod", '', !'Viagem', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteStsFin", '', !'Financ.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteSts", '', !'Status', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWCTeColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz1.Visible = False &CteDesRaz1.Visible = False &CteObsGer1.Visible = False &FilCod1.Visible = False &CteFinEms1.Visible = False &CteDocTra1.Visible = False &CteNomMot1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILCOD' &FilCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEFINEMS' &CteFinEms1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &CteDocTra1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTENOMMOT' &CteNomMot1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz2.Visible = False &CteDesRaz2.Visible = False &CteObsGer2.Visible = False &FilCod2.Visible = False &CteFinEms2.Visible = False &CteDocTra2.Visible = False &CteNomMot2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILCOD' &FilCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEFINEMS' &CteFinEms2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &CteDocTra2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTENOMMOT' &CteNomMot2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz3.Visible = False &CteDesRaz3.Visible = False &CteObsGer3.Visible = False &FilCod3.Visible = False &CteFinEms3.Visible = False &CteDocTra3.Visible = False &CteNomMot3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILCOD' &FilCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEFINEMS' &CteFinEms3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &CteDocTra3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTENOMMOT' &CteNomMot3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReinviarNota' Do Case Case CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' é um CT-e de TERCEIROS e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando If CteModCod = '57' GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) Else GeraXmlCteModelo67.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) EndIF wpAutorizaCte.Link('', EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &SolCod) Otherwise &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' Encontra-se com Status de ' + CteSts.EnumerationDescription() + ' e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Endcase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarSefaz' If not CteChv.Trim().IsEmpty() GravaConsultaSefazCte.Call('WWCTE', EmpCod, FilCod,CteCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Chave do CT-e vazia, verifique!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarNota' If CteSts <> Status_NFe.Autorizada msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente CT-e Autorizados podem ser Cancelados!') Else wpCancelaCte.Link('WWCTE', EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InutilizarNumero' If CteSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando msg('Conhecimento de Transporte com Status Diferente de Digitando, não podem ser inutilizadas!') Else wpInutilizaNumeroCte.Link(EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod, CteNum, CteSer, CteModCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Clonarcte' &Erro = 0 If &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido = 'S' ValidaCteDigitando.call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&erro) EndIf If &erro = 1 Msg("Atenção! Existe CT-e não resolvido (DIGITANDO) com data anterior ao dia de Hoje, Favor Resolve-los (AUTORIZADO, CANCELADO, INUTILIZADO), antes de clonar.") Else /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPClonarCte.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CteNum, CteRemCod, CteDesCod, CteChv, CteFinEms) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do ExportXml' &CteArqXml = RetornaXmlCte.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) If &CteArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) EndIF retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+CteChv+'.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&CteArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Link = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+CteChv+'.xml' Link(&Link) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MDFE' ValidaCteMdfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod,&IsAchou) If &IsAchou = False /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GravaMdfe_Cte.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &MdfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &WebSession.Remove('WPMDFE01_Data') &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod = EmpCod &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.FilCod = FilCod &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod = &MdfeCod &WebSession.Set('WPMDFE01_Data', &MdfWizardData.ToJson()) wpMDFe01.Call('', 'Mdfe', false) Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Já existe um MDFe com status AUTORIZADO utilizando este CT-e, verifique e adicione um MDFe pelo monitora.') EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do Cartacorrecao' WpcartasCorrecaoCte.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ComprovanteEntrega' WpComprovanteEntrega.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Desacordo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEventoDesacordo.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AverbacaoAtm' &EmpCod = EmpCod &FilCod = FilCod Do 'ValidaUsuario' If &IsValido = True and not CteArqXml.IsEmpty() TransmiteAverbacao.call(EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,&SdtAtm,&IsSucesso) If &IsSucesso = true Grid.Refresh() EndIf Else Msg('Não foi Possível transmitir a averbação, pois usuário e senha inválido ou documento não autorizado!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportaXml' &CteAveArq = RetornaXmlCteAverbacao.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) If not &CteAveArq.IsEmpty() retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+'Averbacao_'+CteChv+'.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&CteAveArq) &XmlWriter.Close() &Link = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+'Averbacao_'+CteChv+'.xml' Link(&Link) Else msg('Arquivo xml da averbação não encotrado!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Financeiro' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWDuplicatasCte.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do IniciarViagem' If CteViaCod > 0 WpAdicionaViagens.Link('WWCTe', 'UPD', CteViaCod) Else &AuxVeiPla = CtePlcTra &AuxPesCpf = CteCpfMot &DataVazia.SetEmpty() Do 'GetVeiculo' Do 'GetMotorista' prcMovimentaViagem.Call('INS', EmpCod, FilCod, &NewViaCod, '', &Today, &DataVazia, 0, 0, 0, 'P', CteVlrRecSer, &AuxPesCod, &AuxVeiCod, CteIniUfe, CteIniCidCod, CteTerUfe, CteTerCidCod, CtePlc, '', '', 0,0, &AuxMensagem) prcVinculaViagemCteCarga.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &NewViaCod) If Not &AuxMensagem.IsEmpty() &AuxMensagem = SubStr(&AuxMensagem, 1, 3) If &AuxMensagem = '200' prcValorComissaoViagem.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, 0, &NewViaCod, 0, 0) WpAdicionaViagens.Link('WWCTe', 'UPD', &NewViaCod) EndIf EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Excluir' DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.ConfirmationText = 'Tem certeza que deseja excluir o CT-e nro: '+trim(str(CteNum))+' ?' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FilCod_Selected = FilCod &CteCod_Selected = CteCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action Excluir' ExcluirCte.Call(&EmpCod_Selected,&FilCod_Selected,&CteCod_Selected) Refresh keep /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarStatus' wpSolicitacoesNF.Popup('CTE', EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RetransmitirGrupo' If &SdtSelCte.Count > 1 For &SdtSelCteItem in &SdtSelCte Do Case Case &SdtSelCteItem.CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.FilCod))+ ' é um CT-e de TERCEIROS e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Case &SdtSelCteItem.CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando If &SdtSelCteItem.CteModCod = '57' GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(&SdtSelCteItem.EmpCod, &SdtSelCteItem.FilCod, &SdtSelCteItem.CteCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) Else GeraXmlCteModelo67.Call(&SdtSelCteItem.EmpCod, &SdtSelCteItem.FilCod, &SdtSelCteItem.CteCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) EndIF wpAutorizaCte.Link('', &SdtSelCteItem.EmpCod, &SdtSelCteItem.FilCod, &SdtSelCteItem.CteCod, &SolCod) Otherwise &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.FilCod))+ ' NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Endcase EndFor Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta função só é permitida para mais de 1 CT-e selecionado!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Imprimir' If &SdtSelCte.Count > 1 //Tem mais de 1 CT-e //Cria um nome para o retório &randon = Random()*1000 &RelCTe = 'CteAgr'+trim(str(&randon)) &URLFisico = &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdf + &RelCTe.Trim() + '.pdf' &URLVirtual = &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdfVir + &RelCTe.Trim() + '.pdf' &File.Source = &URLFisico If &File.Exists() &File.Delete() EndIf // Nome e arquivo criados &IsErro = false For &SdtSelCteItem in &SdtSelCte Do Case Case &SdtSelCteItem.CteSts = Status_NFe.digitando &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.FilCod))+ ' NÃO está AUTORIZADO e não pode ser impresso em grupo.' msg(&Mensagem) &IsErro = true exit Case &SdtSelCteItem.CteSts = Status_NFe.autorizada If &CteModCod = '57' RELJAS085_Agrupado.Call(&SdtSelCte, &URLFisico) Else RELJAS160_Agrupado.Call(&SdtSelCte, &URLFisico) EndIF Otherwise &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(&SdtSelCteItem.FilCod))+ ' NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) &IsErro = true Endcase EndFor If &IsErro = false //se não tiver erro em nenhum CT-e então abre a impressão RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = link(&URLVirtual) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIf Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta função só é permitida para mais de 1 CT-e selecionado!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Exportaremgrupo' If &SdtSelCte.Count > 1 ExportaCTe.Call(&SdtSelCte,&sdtConfiguracoesPasta, &ZipXMLSCte) Link(&ZipXMLSCte) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTENUM" &CteNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEPLC" &CtePlc.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTESTS" &CteSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEPROTER" &CteProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEDTAEMS" &CteDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CteDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEMODCOD" &CteModCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILCOD' &FilCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEFINEMS' &CteFinEms1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDOCTRA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CteDocTra1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTENOMMOT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CteNomMot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTENUM", "", not &CteNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEPLC", "", not &CtePlc.IsEmpty(), 0, &CtePlc, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTESTS", "", not &CteSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEPROTER", "", not &CteProTer.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteProTer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEDTAEMS", "", not (&CteDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &CteDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CteDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &CteDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEMODCOD", "", not &CteModCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteModCod, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FILCOD' AND not &FilCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEFINEMS' AND not &CteFinEms1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteFinEms1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDOCTRA' AND not &CteDocTra1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDocTra1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTENOMMOT' AND not &CteNomMot1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteNomMot1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FILCOD' AND not &FilCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEFINEMS' AND not &CteFinEms2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteFinEms2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDOCTRA' AND not &CteDocTra2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDocTra2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTENOMMOT' AND not &CteNomMot2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteNomMot2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FILCOD' AND not &FilCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FilCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEFINEMS' AND not &CteFinEms3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteFinEms3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDOCTRA' AND not &CteDocTra3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDocTra3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTENOMMOT' AND not &CteNomMot3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteNomMot3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"CTE" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_campo.Click &sdtSelCte.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &CtePlc.IsValid FormataPLACA.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &CtePlc, &CtePlc) EndEvent Event &userUpdate.Click &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Geral.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Geral.CteCod = CteCod &WebSession.Set('WPCTE_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) WPCte.Link('', 'Geral', false) EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click &CteArqXml = RetornaXmlCte.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) If &CteArqXml.IsEmpty() If CteModCod = '57' GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) Else GeraXmlCteModelo67.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) EndIf EndIF // LeituraXmlDacte.Call(CteArqXml,&sdtxmlCte) // &XmlWriter.Open('novoTeste.xml') // &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&sdtXmlcte.ToXml()) // &XmlWriter.Close() GeraPdfDacte_web.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = link(&UrlPDF)// RELJAS085.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod,'DACTE') RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click If not CteSts in (Status_NFe.Digitando, Status_NFe.Inutilizada) and CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA wpEnviaCte.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) Else msg('Só é possível o envio de CT-e Próprios, AUTORIZADOS, CANCELADOS, DENEGADOS') EndIF EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &CteSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &CteSel = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CteSel = true Endif If CteSts <> Status_NFe.CANCELADA If &CteSel = True &SdtSelCteItem = new() &SdtSelCteItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtSelCteItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtSelCteItem.CteCod = CteCod &SdtSelCteItem.CteModCod = CteModCod &SdtSelCteItem.CteNum = CteNum &SdtSelCteItem.CteSts = CteSts &SdtSelCteItem.CteProTer = CteProTer &SdtSelCte.Add(&SdtSelCteItem) else For &SdtSelCteItem in &SdtSelCte If &SdtSelCteItem.CteCod = CteCod &Index = &SdtSelCte.IndexOf(&SdtSelCteItem) &SdtSelCte.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Este CT-e está Cancelado e não pode ser selecionado. Verifique! ') EndIf EndEvent Sub 'GetMotorista' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where PesCpf = &AuxPesCpf &AuxPesCod = PesCod Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetVeiculo' For Each Order EmpCod, VeiCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where VeiPla = &AuxVeiPla &AuxVeiCod = VeiCod Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &sdtSelCteItem in &sdtSelCte If &sdtSelCteItem.CteCod = &AuxCteCod &CteSel = true exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'validaUsuario' &IsValido = False For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &SdtAtm.codigoatm = FilAtmCod &SdtAtm.senha = FilAtmSen &SdtAtm.usuario = FilAtmUsu &FilAtmCod = FilAtmCod &FilAtmUsu = FilAtmUsu &FilAtmSen = FilAtmSen exit EndFor If not &FilAtmCod.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmUsu.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmSen.Trim().IsEmpty() &IsValido = True EndIf EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'SEL_WWCTe', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtSelCte.ToJson(), serverDate(),serverNow(),'T') &numeric = &SdtSelCte.Count Ctes.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - CT-e Selec.' EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'SEL_WWCTe', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If (&PadDtaMod - serverDate()) > 1 &SdtSelCte.FromJson('') Else &SdtSelCte.FromJson(&PadObs) EndIf &numeric = &SdtSelCte.Count Ctes.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - CT-e Selec.' EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
